name: Fivetran
philosophy: An inspired interpretation of Fivetran's design language — a managed-data-pipeline brand built on a clean white canvas with a signature deep cobalt (#0073e6) and a dense, technical surface that hosts dozens of source-connector logos on every page. The brand reads as 'mature data platform' — enterprise-clean, logo-density forward, slightly serif-tinged with Tiempos Headline for moments of voice.

design_language.motion_signature: 200ms ease-out on hover; connector logo grid loops subtly on scroll (a 4-row carousel each row drifting at 30px/s in alternating directions); CTA buttons have a subtle 100ms press-down.

trademark_signals: Connector-logo wall as recurring hero device — every product page hosts a 200+ source-logo grid (Salesforce, Stripe, NetSuite, Workday, BigQuery, Snowflake…) — the brand's most-recognized visual
Tiempos Headline serif appears at hero scale (56–72px) for the brand's voice moments — refuses the all-sans data-tool default
Deep cobalt blue (#0073e6) as the single CTA voltage — enterprise-trust blue, not consumer-bright
Pipeline-flow diagram as a secondary hero — source → Fivetran → destination, drawn with hairlines and small connector logos
Light blue-tinted off-white (#f5f8fb) for selected band backgrounds — subtle, not gray
ai_slop_avoided: Don't drop the connector logo wall. The 200+ source logos ARE the trust signal
Don't substitute the cobalt with sky blue or navy. The specific #0073e6 IS the brand
Don't replace Tiempos Headline with Inter at hero scale. The serif is the voice moment in an otherwise all-sans surface
Don't paint a hero gradient. The brand is enterprise-clean — single accent color, no decorative chrome
Don't bold the Tiempos display past weight 500
